ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.aromaPrinciple: [sine][green]Control the variables. Record the results. Adjust the dosage[/green][/sine].
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.banter.alive.endTurn: We still have more Spire to explore!
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.banter.dead.endTurnP: (Hurry up, I'm slipping away from my body...)
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.cardsModifierDescrip: Alchemist cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.description:
An amphibian practicer of esoteric arts.
Transmutes self-inflicted poison into power.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.eventDeathPrevention: Not yet. The others still need me.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.goldMonologue: [sine]Oh. Yes, I suppose that's quite a lot. Anyway—[/sine]
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.title: The Alchemist
